text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
With the distant roar of the crowd<n>pushing her
forward,<n>Matikanefukukitaru dominates the<n>Arima
Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The Matikanefukukitaru who relied<n>purely on luck
is no more. Almost<n>fainting with elation over her
new<n>accomplishment, she heads to the<n>winner's
interview...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Where she tells the spectators that<n>happiness
comes to those who seek<n>it.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She follows that with a grand<n>announcement that
she will continue<n>to run for her fans, promising to
bring<n>them happiness.
